name: Break Will
description: Domination of another creature's will and forced obedience.

novice.description: Allows control over one creature while concentration and Resolute checks hold.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration let you take control of a monster, human, or animal; it can take only one action per turn and cannot use active abilities or powers.

adept.description: Maintains control without concentration and frees the mystic to act normally.

effects.description: Concentration is no longer required to maintain control, and the mystic can freely take other actions.

master.description: Makes the control complete and lets the caster force the target to use its full capabilities.

effects.description: The controlled creature can be forced to take all actions available on its turn and make any checks without restriction.

name: Illusory Correction
description: A twist of perception that lets the mystic replay failed outcomes.

novice.description: Lets the mystic reroll one failed Defense check each turn as a reaction.

effects.description: As a reaction, the mystic may reroll one failed Defense check once per turn.

adept.description: Expands the reroll to any failed check involving the mystic.

effects.description: As a reaction, the mystic may reroll any failed check related to them once per turn.

master.description: Lets the mystic interfere with nearby checks, even those involving others.

effects.description: As a reaction, the mystic may force a reroll of any nearby check once per turn, even if it belonged to someone else.

name: Levitation
description: Control over gravity for hovering flight and lifting allies.

novice.description: Raises the mystic above the ground, but requires concentration and risks a painful fall.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic rise above the ground; if concentration is broken, they fall and take up to d6 armor-ignoring damage.

adept.description: Lets the mystic levitate one ally with the same risk on collapse.

effects.description: Resolute lifts an ally into the air; if concentration is broken, the ally falls and takes up to d6 armor-ignoring damage.

master.description: Lifts the mystic and the whole group, and makes a broken effect end in a safe descent.

effects.description: The mystic may lift themselves and all allies with separate checks; if concentration is lost, the whole group glides safely down.

name: Thought Throw
description: Telekinetic movement of objects and enemies by sheer will.

novice.description: Allows the mystic to hurl objects at a target or block attacks with them.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic lift and throw an object for up to d8 damage, or as a reaction lift one to block a physical or mental attack aimed at them.

adept.description: Lets the mystic seize and fling an enemy, knocking them onto their back.

effects.description: Resolute lifts an enemy into the air, hurls them away for up to d8 damage, and knocks them prone on their back.

master.description: Spreads the telekinetic throw across a whole group until the checks begin to fail.

effects.description: The mystic may lift and hurl a group of enemies away, making a separate check for each one until the first failure.

name: True Form
description: Revealing the real nature of creatures and things through illusions and disguises.

novice.description: Lets the mystic see through illusions and effects that hide what something truly is.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic see through illusions, transformations, and similar concealment; illusions are dispelled, while transformations remain but reveal their true nature.

adept.description: Forces a whole group of creatures to reveal their real shape and shed transformations.

effects.description: The mystic may make a group of creatures show their true nature, and active transformations on them fall away.

master.description: Stops a revealed target from changing shape again.

effects.description: Resolute forces a creature to remain in its true form and prevents it from transforming again while the effect lasts.

name: Invisibility
description: A gentle turn of attention that makes the mystic and allies slip from notice.

novice.description: Removes the mystic from one creature's senses until they take a harmful action.

effects.description: Resolute makes the mystic vanish from one creature's senses until the mystic attacks it or takes another action that harms it.

adept.description: Extends the effect to an entire group of observers.

effects.description: The mystic may disappear from the field of view of a whole group of creatures.

master.description: Lets the mystic hide nearby allies as well, each resolving invisibility separately.

effects.description: The mystic can make both themselves and their allies invisible to a group of creatures, with each ally's invisibility tracked separately.

name: Reflection
description: Illusory doubles that confuse enemies and take blows in the mystic's place.

novice.description: Creates d4 doubles around the mystic that vanish when struck.

effects.description: The mystic creates d4 indistinguishable copies around themselves; enemies who cannot tell truth from illusion may attack them instead, and any hit dispels a copy.

adept.description: Increases the number of copies and makes them harder to clear with area damage.

effects.description: The number of copies increases to d6, and area damage dispels only one copy.

master.description: Raises the number of copies to d8 and makes them ignore area damage.

effects.description: The Master creates d8 copies, and area damage no longer reduces their number.

name: Psychic Strike
description: A mental weapon that reinforces a mundane blow with psychic force.

novice.description: Creates a psychic copy of a melee weapon and grants a retry on a miss.

effects.description: The mystic forms a psychic copy of their melee weapon and may reroll the hit check if the original melee attack misses.

adept.description: Paralyzes the target and makes the physical half of the strike hit automatically.

effects.description: Resolute makes the psychic strike paralyze the target, and the physical attack becomes an automatic hit.

master.description: Adds a separate burst of armor-ignoring psychic damage to the strike.

effects.description: The psychic strike deals d4 extra damage on top of the physical attack, and that bonus damage ignores armor.

name: Anathema
description: Dispelling foreign magic and non-ritual supernatural effects.

novice.description: Removes an ongoing hostile spell effect from one target.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic remove an ongoing effect of another caster's spell from themselves or from any other target.

adept.description: Lets the mystic dispel effects from a whole group at once.

effects.description: The spell may be used to dispel effects from a whole group of creatures or objects at once.

master.description: Cleanses an entire area of magic, including summons and created phenomena.

effects.description: The Master may remove any magic from an area, including summoned creatures and magically created phenomena.

name: Witch Hammer
description: Blessed weaponry made especially deadly against monsters and the corrupt.

novice.description: Empowers a consecrated weapon and punishes monsters even harder.

effects.description: A consecrated weapon deals +d4 damage, or +d6 against corrupt creatures and monsters.

adept.description: Raises the bonus damage of the blessed weapon to d8.

effects.description: The mystic's weapon deals +d8 damage.

master.description: Raises the bonus damage of the blessed weapon to d10.

effects.description: The mystic's weapon deals +d10 damage.

name: Blessed Shield
description: An unseen holy shield that raises armor and scorches attackers.

novice.description: Creates a shield for the whole battle that improves armor and punishes monster attacks.

effects.description: Resolute creates a shield in the air until the end of the battle: it grants +d4 Armor and deals d4 armor-ignoring damage to monsters that attack the mystic.

adept.description: Extends the shield to one nearby ally and raises both effects to d6.

effects.description: The shield may also protect one nearby ally, and both its Armor bonus and its retaliatory damage increase to d6.

master.description: Lets the shield cover up to two nearby allies and raises it to d8.

effects.description: The shield may also cover up to two nearby allies, and both its Armor bonus and its retaliatory damage increase to d8.

name: Holy Aura
description: A lasting aura that burns monsters and sustains the living nearby.

novice.description: Fills the area around the mystic with holy power that harms hostile monsters.

effects.description: Resolute fills the surrounding space with an aura that deals up to d6 damage each turn to hostile monsters while the mystic sustains it.

adept.description: Strengthens the aura's damage and adds healing for living beings.

effects.description: The aura's damage rises to d8, and all living creatures within it recover d4 Survival each turn.

master.description: Raises both the damaging and healing halves of the aura to their peak.

effects.description: The aura's damage rises to d10, and the healing it grants to living creatures rises to d6 Survival each turn.

name: Burning Glass
description: A focused beam of holy light that is especially lethal to monsters.

novice.description: Focuses the mystic's inner light into a ray that burns monsters harder than anything else.

effects.description: Resolute concentrates the light of the mystic's soul into a burning ray that deals d6 damage to a target, or d8 if the target is a monster.

adept.description: Turns the beam into an area effect and hits monsters even harder.

effects.description: Resolute deals d8 damage to all targets at once, or d12 if they are monsters.

master.description: Adds a stun to every monster struck by the light.

effects.description: On a successful effect, the mystic may also stun all affected monsters for one turn.

name: Life-Giver
description: Purification of Corruption and a healing force born from love of life.

novice.description: Removes Corruption from one target and turns excess cleansing into healing.

effects.description: The spell removes up to d4 Corruption from a target; if the target has less than that, the remainder becomes healing.

adept.description: Spreads the same cleansing effect to all visible allies.

effects.description: The cleansing and healing effect now works on all visible allies around the mystic.

master.description: Weakens new Corruption effects in the mystic's presence.

effects.description: Any effect of newly acquired Corruption is reduced by d4 while the mystic is present.

name: Purgatory
description: Punishment that turns a target's Corruption into paralysis and pure harm.

novice.description: Compares d20 to the target's Corruption, paralyzing them and scorching monsters.

effects.description: If a d20 roll is less than or equal to the target's Corruption, the target is paralyzed for a turn, and monsters also suffer d6 armor-ignoring damage.

adept.description: Lets the mystic compare the result against every visible target at once.

effects.description: The d20 result is compared to the Corruption of all visible targets at the same time.

master.description: Triggers reactively whenever Corruption is gained or used and turns it directly into damage.

effects.description: As a reaction, the effect automatically strikes any target that gains or uses Corruption: each point of Corruption becomes one point of armor-ignoring damage, though allies may be exempted.

name: Laying on of Hands
description: Direct miraculous healing through touch, gaze, and cleansing grace.

novice.description: Heals d6 Survival through touch.

effects.description: Resolute heals a touched target for d6 Survival.

adept.description: Improves the healing and cleanses poison and bleeding.

effects.description: Touch now heals d8 Survival and removes all poison and bleeding effects from the target.

master.description: Lets the mystic heal powerfully in melee or heal at range with a glance.

effects.description: Resolute heals d12 Survival by touch, or d8 at range with nothing but a look.

name: Inherit Wound
description: Redistribution of wounds, poison, and bleeding according to the mystic's will.

novice.description: Lets the mystic take another creature's harm onto themselves and heal that creature.

effects.description: The mystic may draw harm from another creature onto themselves: the target heals d6 Survival, while the mystic takes the same amount of damage.

adept.description: Improves the healing, reduces the backlash, and lets the mystic absorb toxins.

effects.description: The healing increases to d8, the mystic takes only half that amount as damage, and they may also take all poison and bleeding effects onto themselves.

master.description: Lets the mystic send the remaining harm into any other visible creature.

effects.description: The mystic may transfer the remaining half of the damage to any other visible creature; that damage cannot be defended against and ignores armor.

name: Maltransformation
description: A forced transformation that reduces the victim to a harmless beast.

novice.description: Turns one target into a harmless animal while the mystic holds concentration.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration transform the chosen target into a harmless beast; in that form it cannot act or use weapons.

adept.description: Removes the need to keep concentrating on the transformation.

effects.description: Concentration is no longer required to maintain the effect.

master.description: Lets the mystic lay the transformation on multiple nearby creatures.

effects.description: The mystic may transform multiple nearby creatures, making a separate Resolute check for each until the first failure.

name: Wild Hunt
description: Calling natural beasts out of the land itself to fight for the mystic.

novice.description: Summons one weak beast native to the local land.

effects.description: The mystic summons one weak beast appropriate to the terrain; after the battle, the animal returns to where it came from.

adept.description: Lets the mystic call either one strong beast or a pack of weaker ones.

effects.description: The mystic may summon one strong beast or d4 weak beasts.

master.description: Opens the way to mighty beasts and larger packs.

effects.description: The mystic may summon one mighty beast, d4 strong beasts, or d6 weak beasts.

name: Change Form
description: The mystic transforms themselves into a beast for speed, battle, and resilience.

novice.description: Lets the mystic become a small animal and gain exceptional agility and evasiveness.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic take the shape of a small animal: they may reroll all failed Discreet and Quick checks, including Defense, and enemies can no longer make Free Attacks against them in that form.

adept.description: Unlocks a combat beast form with basic battle traits.

effects.description: The mystic may turn into a combat beast and gains the traits Hardened (Novice) and Natural Weapon (Novice).

master.description: Unlocks a large combat form with regeneration and great might.

effects.description: The mystic may turn into a large combat beast and gains the traits Regeneration (Novice) and Mighty (Novice).

name: Thorn Cloak
description: A living mantle of vines and thorns that protects the mystic and wounds attackers.

novice.description: Wraps the mystic in living growth that grants more armor if they hold still.

effects.description: Vines, roots, and thorns raise the mystic's Armor by +d4, or by +d6 if the mystic did not move on the previous turn.

adept.description: Lets nearby allies share in the protection so long as they stay close.

effects.description: The vines may also protect allies, so long as they do not break away from the mystic's side.

master.description: Awakened nature begins to strike back automatically at attackers.

effects.description: Every successful attack against the mystic or a protected ally triggers d10 retaliatory damage that ignores armor.

name: Embrace of Earth
description: Retreat beneath the ground for safety, movement, and hidden spellcasting.

novice.description: Lets the mystic sink underground and become unreachable, but unable to act.

effects.description: Resolute places the mystic beneath the earth, beyond the reach of enemies; while there, the mystic cannot act and must repeat the Resolute check each turn or return to the surface.

adept.description: Lets the mystic use mystical powers underground and removes the upkeep checks.

effects.description: The mystic may use mystical powers while underground and no longer needs repeated Resolute checks to stay there.

master.description: Gives the mystic sight of the surface and freedom of movement below it.

effects.description: The mystic may see allies and enemies on the surface, use mystical powers on them, and move freely while underground.

name: Binding Vines
description: Roots and vines rise to restrain enemies and eventually tear them with thorns.

novice.description: Entangles one enemy and takes away its mobility.

effects.description: Resolute summons vines, roots, or strong tendrils to bind a target; it cannot move, though it may still use ranged weapons and cast spells.

adept.description: Lets the binding spread through a chain of enemies.

effects.description: Resolute may extend the effect through a chain of enemies until the first failed check.

master.description: Adds thorns that keep dealing pain to bound targets.

effects.description: The summoned vines gain thorns, and entangled enemies take d6 armor-ignoring damage.

name: Storm Arrow
description: Arrows enchanted to hover in the air and fly unerringly to their targets.

novice.description: Suspends up to five arrows beside the mystic and lets them fire without missing.

effects.description: Resolute enchants up to five arrows to hover beside the mystic and launch as a free action, always hitting for d6 damage and carrying any effects already placed on the ammunition.

adept.description: Strengthens the arrows and lets the mystic send two at once.

effects.description: The arrows deal up to d8 damage, and the mystic may launch two at the same time.

master.description: Raises the volley to three arrows at once.

effects.description: The mystic may launch three arrows at the same time.

name: Curse
description: The evil eye of the mystic that twists actions and turns activity into self-destruction.

novice.description: Forces the target to achieve two successes on actions directed against the mystic.

effects.description: Resolute lays a curse on the target so that any action directed against the mystic requires two successes instead of one.

adept.description: Extends that double-check burden to every action the victim takes.

effects.description: The cursed target must effectively confirm all of its actions, regardless of whom those actions affect.

master.description: Turns the curse into a death sentence that punishes every action with damage.

effects.description: Resolute places a death curse on the target: every action it takes, whether successful or not, deals d6 armor-ignoring damage to it.

name: Tormenting Spirits
description: Summoned spirits harry the victim, ruin concentration, and wear away the mind.

novice.description: Breaks concentration and makes all of the target's checks harder.

effects.description: The summoned spirits break the target's concentration and force it to make two checks for any success; Resolute may carry the torment into the next turn.

adept.description: Adds a steady drain on the target's Resolute.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration let the spirits reduce the target's Resolute by d4 each turn while the effect lasts.

master.description: Increases the pace of Resolute damage to d6 each turn.

effects.description: The damage dealt to the target's Resolute increases to d6 each turn.

name: Larval Pustule
description: A vile infestation of larvae that eats the victim alive from within.

novice.description: Plants larvae in an enemy, dealing ongoing internal damage and ruining concentration.

effects.description: The mystic places larvae inside the enemy: the target takes d4 armor-ignoring damage each turn, cannot maintain concentration, and Resolute may carry the effect into the next turn.

adept.description: Raises the larvae's damage to d6 each turn.

effects.description: The larvae deal d6 damage each turn.

master.description: Raises the larvae's damage to d8 each turn.

effects.description: The larvae deal d8 damage each turn.

name: Bewilderment
description: A maze of sensations that makes the victim lose control of their own behavior.

novice.description: Confuses one opponent and randomly determines what they do each turn.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration bewilder the target; each turn a d6 determines whether it is paralyzed, attacks the nearest ally, or attacks the nearest enemy.

adept.description: Removes the need for concentration and keeps the mystic from becoming a random target.

effects.description: The effect no longer requires concentration, and the target will no longer try to attack the mystic.

master.description: Lets the mystic spread bewilderment across multiple enemies.

effects.description: The mystic may cast the spell on several enemies, making a Resolute check for each additional target until the first failure.

name: Ghost Strike
description: A cursed weapon that kills more effectively and raises its victims as undead servants.

novice.description: Shrouds the weapon in ominous flame and raises its damage.

effects.description: The witch kindles an ominous flame around their melee weapon, and it deals +d4 damage.

adept.description: Raises anything slain by the weapon as obedient undead.

effects.description: Any living creature killed by the mystic's weapon immediately rises again as undead and obeys the witch until the end of the battle.

master.description: Raises the weapon's bonus damage to d8.

effects.description: The extra damage from Ghost Strike increases to +d8.

name: Corrupt Aura
description: An aura of foul energy that harms the living and nourishes monsters.

novice.description: Creates a corrupt aura around the mystic that damages the living and requires concentration.

effects.description: Resolute creates an aura around the mystic that harms humans and animals for d6 armor-ignoring damage while concentration is maintained.

adept.description: Removes the concentration requirement and lets the mystic spare chosen creatures.

effects.description: Concentration is no longer required, and the mystic may exclude selected creatures from the aura.

master.description: Strengthens the aura and makes it a source of healing for monsters and summons.

effects.description: The aura deals up to d8 damage and also heals monsters and summoned creatures for d8 Survival.

name: Black Arrow
description: A corrupt dart of force that wounds and immobilizes its victims.

novice.description: Fires one Black Arrow that hurts and restrains the target until concentration breaks.

effects.description: Resolute fires a Black Arrow: on a hit it deals d6 armor-ignoring damage and prevents the target from acting until concentration is broken or the target wins with Resolute; only one such effect may be maintained at a time.

adept.description: Lets the mystic hold multiple targets in the same linked effect.

effects.description: The effect may spread to several targets until the first miss, but if one target breaks free, the entire group is released.

master.description: Separates the linked prisoners so each must escape individually.

effects.description: Each trapped target now escapes individually, so long as concentration remains unbroken.

name: Black Breath
description: A play with the target's Corruption that can either heal or deepen it.

novice.description: Compares d4 to the target's current Corruption to decide between healing and more corruption.

effects.description: If a d4 roll is lower than the target's current Corruption, the target heals that much; if it is higher, the target gains that much Corruption instead.

adept.description: Increases the strength of the effect to d6.

effects.description: The comparison and result now use d6 instead of d4.

master.description: Lets the effect jump across a group until it finally heals someone.

effects.description: The spell may be applied to a group of targets, spreading through them until the first time it produces healing.

name: Spirit Path
description: A shift into an immaterial spirit state for passage, safety, and armor-piercing attacks.

novice.description: Lets the mystic become a spirit and pass through walls, enemies, and ordinary weapons.

effects.description: Resolute turns the mystic into a spirit, allowing up to ten meters of travel through walls and enemies and granting immunity to ordinary weapons.

adept.description: Lets the mystic enter spirit form as a reaction to a physical attack.

effects.description: Resolute replaces Defense and lets the mystic become a spirit as a reaction to a physical attack, then return to normal immediately afterward.

master.description: Lets the mystic's own attacks touch the spirit world and ignore armor.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic's weapons or spells slip into the spirit world at the moment of impact, so their attacks may ignore armor.

name: Teleport
description: A tear in reality for instant travel through the Other World.

novice.description: Moves the mystic a short distance, but deals harm and risks opening the way to something else.

effects.description: Resolute teleports the mystic up to two normal moves away through the Other World; the passage deals d4 armor-ignoring damage, does not provoke Free Attacks, and on failure may release a creature from the breach.

adept.description: Makes the passage safe and gives the mystic a chance to stop a monster from crossing over.

effects.description: The mystic no longer takes damage from the journey and may reroll Resolute to prevent a monster from emerging through the tear if the teleport fails.

master.description: Lets the mystic bring a nearby companion along at the cost of pain and temporary Corruption.

effects.description: The mystic may take along anyone standing nearby; the passenger suffers d4 armor-ignoring damage and d4 temporary Corruption.

name: Banishment
description: Hurling an enemy into the Other World, with the risk of a hostile breach in return.

novice.description: Sends one enemy into the Other World and returns it weakened.

effects.description: Resolute sends the chosen enemy into the Other World; it returns on the next turn shocked, with d4 armor-ignoring damage and d4 temporary Corruption.

adept.description: Keeps the victim banished until it can force its way back with Resolute.

effects.description: The target remains in the Other World until it passes a Resolute check to return, and the portal stays open while it is alive and trying to come back.

master.description: Turns banishment into a reaction against an attacker.

effects.description: Resolute lets the mystic send a creature that attacked them into the Other World as a reaction; the creature returns after one turn.

name: Retribution
description: The mystic's anger binds enemies to misfortune and reflected pain.

novice.description: Marks one target so everyone else can finish it more easily.

effects.description: Resolute condenses dark energy around the target, allowing any attacker to reroll any failed attack against it until the end of the battle.

adept.description: Creates a reactive harmful link between the mystic and one attacker.

effects.description: As a reaction, the mystic may forge a deadly link to one attacker so that all damage the mystic receives, from any source, is mirrored onto that target.

master.description: Lets the mystic maintain several harmful links at once.

effects.description: The mystic may create a new deadly link with each new attacker without ending the old ones, duplicating incoming damage onto all linked enemies.

name: Sulfur Cascade
description: Violent streams of fire that lash one enemy after another.

novice.description: Whips one foe with flame and still hurts them on a failed check.

effects.description: Resolute lashes an enemy with a cascade of fire for d12 damage, or d6 if the check fails.

adept.description: Lets the cascade leap from one enemy to the next.

effects.description: After the first successful hit, the mystic may strike the next enemy, and then the next, continuing until the first failed check.

master.description: Turns the cascade into a sustained burning assault that ends only with repeated failure.

effects.description: The fiery cascades continue burning enemies until the mystic fails two checks in a turn.

name: Wall of Fire
description: A wall or dome of flame that divides space and burns anything that crosses it.

novice.description: Raises a blazing wall that blocks movement and inflicts heavy damage on anything passing through.

effects.description: Resolute raises a broad wall of whirling flame that forces enemies to go around, deals d12 armor-ignoring damage to anything crossing it, and burns up small objects such as arrows.

adept.description: Lets the wall curl into a ring around chosen creatures.

effects.description: The wall may be folded into a ring around the mystic, allies, or selected enemies marked for isolation.

master.description: Lets the wall become a full dome of flame.

effects.description: The wall may take the shape of a dome.

name: Fire Soul
description: For the mystic, fire becomes shield, weapon, and source of healing.

novice.description: Scorches attackers and improves resistance against fire.

effects.description: As a reaction, the mystic deals d6 fire damage to anyone who attacks them and gains +d6 Armor when defending against fire.

adept.description: Raises the returned damage in melee and strengthens fire defense further.

effects.description: The returned melee damage rises to d10, and the Armor bonus against fire rises to +d10.

master.description: Makes the mystic immune to fire and turns flame into healing.

effects.description: The mystic no longer takes fire damage, half of any potential fire damage becomes healing instead, and any non-mental attack against them may trigger d10 returned damage.

name: Battle Hymn
description: An inspiring song that strengthens the physical gifts of nearby allies.

novice.description: Raises one chosen physical attribute for each ally.

effects.description: Each ally may increase either Quick, Strong, or Accurate by one.

adept.description: Raises all three battle attributes at once.

effects.description: Allies increase Quick, Strong, and Accurate by one.

master.description: Adds a single pulse of healing to the hymn once per battle.

effects.description: The hymn also heals d6 Survival once per battle.

name: Elegy
description: A focusing song that steadies the mind, charm, and self-control of allies.

novice.description: Lets each ally choose one mental attribute to improve.

effects.description: Each ally may increase either Discreet, Resolute, or Appealing by one.

adept.description: Raises all three mental attributes together.

effects.description: Allies increase Discreet, Resolute, and Appealing by one.

master.description: Lets the song prevent temporary Corruption once per battle.

effects.description: The elegy also prevents d4 temporary Corruption once per battle.

name: Pamphlet
description: A cutting harmony that disorients enemies and makes them overturn their own successes.

novice.description: Forces wounded enemies to reroll even their successful checks.

effects.description: Appealing forces wounded enemies to reroll all of their successful checks for any action.

adept.description: Spreads that same humiliation to all enemies, wounded or not.

effects.description: All enemies must reroll all of their successful checks for any action.

master.description: Adds ongoing armor-ignoring damage to the effect.

effects.description: On success, the affected target also takes d4 armor-ignoring damage each turn while the effect lasts.

name: Dancing Weapon
description: A weapon lifted by will alone to fight and defend in the mystic's place.

novice.description: Lets the weapon fight on its own, but forbids other active powers.

effects.description: Resolute replaces Accurate for attack and Quick for Defense while the weapon fights by itself, but the mystic may not use other active abilities.

adept.description: Allows spellcasting and other abilities alongside the floating weapon.

effects.description: The mystic may use abilities and other powers while the effect lasts, although activating the weapon still requires a full action.

master.description: Makes the enchantment permanent and removes the action cost to set it in motion.

effects.description: The mystic's weapon is always enchanted and needs no action to activate: while it holds its position, the mystic is free to do anything else.

name: Banishing Seal
description: A symbol that drives a chosen kind of creature out of a marked area.

novice.description: Expels a group of one chosen creature type from the seal's area.

effects.description: Resolute drives a group of the chosen creature type from the symbol's area, checking each creature in sequence until the first failure; expelled creatures cannot return for an hour.

adept.description: Threatens the creature where the chain breaks if it hesitates to leave.

effects.description: The creature where the banishment chain breaks risks d4 armor-ignoring damage if it does not leave the area immediately.

master.description: Raises the punishment for resisting the seal.

effects.description: The creature where the chain breaks risks d8 armor-ignoring damage, or only d4 if it leaves the symbol's area at once.

name: Draining Glyph
description: An awakened symbol siphons life from enemies and later redirects it to allies.

novice.description: Deals steady damage to all nearby enemies while the mystic concentrates.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration make the symbol deal d4 armor-ignoring damage each turn to all enemies nearby.

adept.description: Lets the glyph continue without concentration.

effects.description: Concentration is no longer required to preserve the effect.

master.description: Redirects the stolen vitality into nearby allies.

effects.description: The life force taken by the glyph is redirected into allies, restoring d4 Survival to them each turn.

name: Blinding Symbol
description: A burst of light from a symbol that strips sight from enemies for longer and longer spans.

novice.description: Blinds a group of enemies for one turn.

effects.description: Resolute blinds a group of enemies for one turn.

adept.description: Lets the blinding continue so long as concentration and Resolute hold.

effects.description: The effect continues until concentration is broken or the mystic fails a Resolute check.

master.description: Makes the blindness last until it is cured by magic or elixirs.

effects.description: The effect lasts until the target heals it with magic or alchemical elixirs.

name: Protective Runes
description: Guarding runes create a separate layer of magical armor and lash back at attackers.

novice.description: Creates rune-armor that is checked separately against each incoming blow.

effects.description: Resolute and concentration create d4 Armor that is rolled separately against every incoming strike.

adept.description: Adds armor-ignoring return damage to the runes.

effects.description: Protective runes also return d4 damage that ignores armor.

master.description: Raises both the protection and the backlash, and removes the need for concentration.

effects.description: Both the Armor and the returned damage increase to d6, and concentration is no longer required to maintain the effect.

name: Sphere
description: A spinning weapon forms a defensive sphere against physical arms.

novice.description: Replaces ordinary Defense with Resolute, but limits the mystic to movement only.

effects.description: While Sphere is active, Resolute replaces Quick to determine Defense against physical weapons, but the mystic may do nothing except move.

adept.description: Turns the defense against physical weapons into an automatic ward so long as concentration holds.

effects.description: The protective Sphere automatically stops all physical weapons while the mystic maintains concentration.

master.description: Lets the Sphere protect a nearby ally and frees the mystic to act more broadly without concentration.

effects.description: The Sphere may protect not only the mystic but also a nearby ally, the mystic may take non-attack actions while it lasts, and concentration is no longer required.

name: Staff Projectile
description: A staff or other weapon becomes a self-guiding missile that always returns to its master.

novice.description: Lets the mystic throw a staff with Resolute instead of Accurate and deliver any existing enchantments through it.

effects.description: Resolute replaces Accurate to hurl a staff for d8 damage, and any enchantments already placed on the weapon may trigger on the hit.

adept.description: Lets the weapon bypass obstacles and increases the impact.

effects.description: The staff may pass around walls and enemies as long as the mystic can see some part of the target, and the damage rises to d10.

master.description: Turns the throw into a chained attack across multiple targets with descending damage.

effects.description: The mystic may attack up to five visible targets at once: the first takes d12 damage, the second d10, and so on, and a miss does not break the chain.
